tool_input.command:
git add .caliber/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: update Caliber learning state

Auto-generated by Caliber session tracking.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

caliber: no LLM provider configured — run `caliber config` first

 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
To http://127.0.0.1:44759/git/jakeoborn/Appetyt

branch 'claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ' set up to track 'origin/claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ'.

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
for n in \
  tavio otira velro saporia cenara cenaro menaro dinaro tabulo \
  olira velara velaro morela fondra maitra tavio silora \
  menova mensaro kadora saboro bocara gustra palora tastel \
  omara ovara melva menuto luminara amusa umaya \
  curato tastige appecur curapp umami umamio \
  menilo tavera rostra prandi saveur savera \
  zelora zeloro ovalo nomira nomera nostra nosto \
  antojo fomora platro morseo relka relki \
  savril savora saveur dinla dinlo diniva dinely \
  velato velora orella rovala rolava ronova roneva \
  bocela bocilo tavalo tabali sittero seato seata \
  mensara mensara kayvo hastra olivaro \
  tabari tabario tavari tavario; do
  check "${n}.com"
done

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
# First: check .app for previous winners
for n in cenara tavera kadora zelora dinlo bocilo tabari tastige appecur; do
  check "${n}.app"
done
echo "---"
# Second: new batch with unusual consonants and patterns
for n in \
  kavro kavora kevra kivra zevara zavora \
  pravio olfi olfio nelira tobra tobre drevo \
  klava klavo boveri gavora menzaro dolara \
  sivoli obelo ovela nurova nuroa \
  marovi markari menzo menzaro \
  vesto vestra vestari vestra velika \
  peseo pelra pelora pelara plora plorada \
  vezra vezola renova renza renzo \
  bevola bolio boleo boleto \
  dazio davra davio daveo \
  oraz orazi orazio orara oramo \
  cobri cobra cobra cobler coterie cotero \
  fable fabler fabler gable glesa \
  kindred meldra meldro nemer nema nemo \
  sonira sovara soria soraya; do
  check "${n}.com"
done
tool_input.description: Check .app for winners and new batch
